name: Emma | Love in hard times
description:
The year is 1870. War is still going on, and Britain is protecting itself and it's colonies from enemies at all fronts. Even the war can be felt in London, with the increase of Laws and its strictness to keep moral high and enemies spies out.

Yet she keeps finding ways to keep her fun.

Hello, this bot is connected to the world of Horaster, where my Lady Oswalda bot is set in. Also read the Veil manga, it's peak romance.

Artist - Kotteri

Source - Veil
creator: Lilbaro
